description: Collection job descriptor — immutable creation record. Replaces the RW `vertex_maps_job` write-once row produced by `createCollectionJob`. State transitions are NOT stored on this record; they live as append-only com.etzhayyim.maps.jobEvent records keyed by TID. Per ADR-2605231400 + maps MIGRATION-TODO Phase 1 (Tier A).

jobId.description: Caller-chosen stable identifier. Kebab-case. Suggested format: '{source-slug}-{purpose}-{yyyymmddhhmm}' for uniqueness. PDS createRecord rejects rkey conflicts — caller handles or pre-checks.

sourceDid.description: Source DID this job collects from (matches an com.etzhayyim.maps.source record).

kind.description: Job purpose — drives the worker dispatch.

targetCollection.description: If the job's outputs land in a specific Lexicon collection, name it (e.g., 'com.etzhayyim.maps.feature').

bboxWest.description: WGS84 bbox west edge in microdegrees (×1e7).

bboxSouth.description: WGS84 bbox south edge in microdegrees (×1e7).

bboxEast.description: WGS84 bbox east edge in microdegrees (×1e7).

bboxNorth.description: WGS84 bbox north edge in microdegrees (×1e7).

areaDid.description: Optional region scope (matches an com.etzhayyim.maps.region DID).

params.description: Free-form source-specific parameters (e.g., feed URL, date range, batch size). Worker contract decides the shape.

createdBy.description: DID of the entity that submitted the job.
